text: There is a curious sense of otherworldliness here. The blue and purple glow from the neon-lit room ahead teases the possibility of innovation or discovery, but the emptiness and shadows feel almost uncanny. I sense a hush of anticipation, as if the purpose of this place is yet to be revealed to me, and I stand at the threshold of understanding, waiting for something—an idea, a conversation—to pull me inside and bring meaning to this modern place.
